h1: text-h1 font-bold leading-tight tracking-h1 text-konde-ink-900 m-0
h1-green: text-h1 font-bold leading-tight tracking-h1 text-konde-green m-0
h2: text-h2 font-semibold leading-snug tracking-h2 text-konde-ink-900 m-0
h3: text-h3 font-semibold leading-heading tracking-h3 text-konde-ink-900 m-0
h3-sm: text-h3-sm font-semibold leading-snug tracking-h3 text-konde-ink-900 m-0
sub: block font-normal text-h5 tracking-h4 text-konde-ink-700 mt-4.5
caption: text-caption text-konde-ink-500
eyebrow: block font-mono text-caption tracking-mono-lg uppercase text-konde-ink-700
link-inline: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-body font-semibold text-konde-green no-underline hover:underline
link-underline: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-body font-medium text-konde-ink-900 border-b border-konde-ink-900 no-underline pb-0.5 hover:text-konde-green-600 hover:border-konde-green-600
